name: Gold Tone Chunky Starfish Charm Bracelet
description: Make a splash with this statement gold-tone charm bracelet. Featuring a chunky, twisted chain adorned with beautifully detailed, textured starfish charms. Finished with a premium anti-tarnish coating for endless summer style.

media.alt_text: Model wearing a chunky gold tone twisted chain bracelet with textured starfish charms

faqs.question: Is this bracelet heavy?
faqs.answer: It has a bold, chunky statement look but is carefully crafted to remain comfortable for everyday wear.

faqs.question: Can I wear this to the beach?
faqs.answer: Yes, it features a durable anti-tarnish finish! However, we recommend rinsing it with fresh water after exposure to salt water to maintain its optimal shine.

meta_title: Gold Tone Chunky Starfish Charm Bracelet | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the Gold Tone Chunky Starfish Charm Bracelet. Featuring a bold twisted chain, textured coastal starfish charms, and a lasting anti-tarnish finish.
